text: I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The environment is modern and clearly dedicated to learning and innovation. The glass walls and brightly lit spaces give an air of transparency and openness, yet the emptiness and silence of the meeting room leave me feeling somewhat isolated. Stepping closer to the "R+D" installation, I sense a spark—here is a place for reflection on knowledge, invention, and our collective quest for understanding. The words on the display invite me to pause; I am both visitor and thinker in this space, poised between solitude and inspiration.
